name: blackbar
description: On-demand PII detection and anonymization with Microsoft Presidio.
long_description: Adds two tools to Claude Desktop: presidio_analyze (find PII in text) and presidio_anonymize (replace, mask, hash, redact, or encrypt it). A zero-dependency Node server talks to a local Presidio Analyzer over HTTP, so detection runs entirely on your machine and the bundle needs no extra install. Note: this is the on-demand half of blackbar; the automatic redaction hooks only exist in Claude Code.

tools.name: presidio_analyze
tools.description: Detect PII in text and return entity types, spans, and scores.

tools.name: presidio_anonymize
tools.description: Return a copy of the text with PII replaced, masked, hashed, redacted, or encrypted.

analyzer_url.title: Presidio Analyzer URL
analyzer_url.description: Endpoint of your local Presidio Analyzer service.

anonymizer_url.title: Presidio Anonymizer URL (optional)
anonymizer_url.description: Only needed for the reversible 'encrypt' operator.

language.title: Detection language
language.description: Language code such as en or es.
